testcase.name: logOut

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: (//img[@class='profileImg'])[1]' (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.name: verifyLocationExportPDF
